environment.note: Local benchmark results depend on hardware, cache driver, serialization settings, and payload shape.

profiles.description: Small mixed payload below large-data thresholds.
profiles.success_metric: No optimization should be applied to small payloads.
profiles.result_summary: Passed: SmartCache correctly skipped optimization for a small payload.

profiles.success_metric: Compressed storage should be smaller than raw storage.
profiles.result_summary: Passed: compression reduced stored size for a large repetitive JSON payload.

profiles.description: Large Eloquent-like list of associative records.
profiles.success_metric: Payload should be split into chunks and restored with data integrity.
profiles.result_summary: Passed: chunking split a large array and restored it with data integrity; byte reduction is not the goal for this profile.

profiles.description: Large sparse numeric array used to verify key preservation.
profiles.success_metric: Sparse numeric keys should survive chunking and restore.
profiles.result_summary: Passed: chunking preserved sparse numeric keys; byte reduction is not the goal for this profile.
